steps.title: Target combined carrying capacity
steps.content: The student wants the combined carrying capacity of Belgium's merchant ships in 2021. The notes define carrying capacity as deadweight tonnage and give the combined DWT as 9.6 million tons.

steps.title: Exclude counts and definitions alone
steps.content: A and D report the number of ships, not their combined capacity. B defines deadweight tonnage but gives no value for Belgium in 2021. The answer is C.
